description: Address review findings: remove turbopack.ignoreIssue config, make all path computations lazy, inline loadRuntimeModule wrappers, fix download type, remove comment noise.
steps: Step 1 - Make all top-level path computations lazy in dataDir.ts, sqliteHelpers.ts, localDbStorage.ts, sqliteBootstrap.ts, mitm/paths.ts, requestDetailsDb/core.ts, usageDb/core.ts
Step 2 - Remove turbopack.ignoreIssue block from next.config.ts
Step 3 - Inline loadRuntimeModule wrappers in 4 API route files
Step 4 - Fix download type in tunnelStatus.ts
Step 5 - Remove comment noise in state.ts
Step 6 - Verify: tsc --noEmit, npm run build
acceptance_criteria: Zero top-level path.join with dynamic values in affected modules
